# DevTools by developers.do - Complete Documentation

> A collection of free developer tools that run 100% client-side in your browser. No backend. All tool processing happens locally on the user device. Anonymized analytics are used to improve the site.

## About DevTools

DevTools is a suite of browser-based utilities for software developers built with privacy as a core principle.

- 100% client-side: tools run in the browser using JavaScript, WebAssembly, and Web APIs.
- No upload required: tool input is not transmitted to a backend.
- Open source: built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
- Website: https://developers.do

## Tool Categories

### AI Tools

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/ai-tools

#### JS Tokenizers
URL: https://developers.do/tools/js-tokenizer

Tokenize text using various AI tokenizers

#### RAG Chunker
URL: https://developers.do/tools/rag-chunker

Split text into retrieval-friendly chunks with overlap and token counts

#### Sentiment Analysis
URL: https://developers.do/tools/sentiment-analysis

Analyze emotional tone of text using AI

#### Zero-Shot Classification
URL: https://developers.do/tools/zero-shot-classification

Classify text into custom categories without training using AI

#### Sentence Similarity
URL: https://developers.do/tools/sentence-similarity

Generate embeddings and find semantic similarity between texts using AI

#### Question Answering
URL: https://developers.do/tools/question-answering

Answer questions based on provided context using AI

#### Fill-Mask Text Completion
URL: https://developers.do/tools/fill-mask

Complete sentences and predict missing words using AI

#### Text Summarization
URL: https://developers.do/tools/text-summarization

Summarize long text into concise overviews using AI

#### Text Extractor
URL: https://developers.do/tools/text-extractor

Extract emails, URLs, IPs, dates, and patterns from text

#### Vibe Check
URL: https://developers.do/tools/vibe-check

Generate AI code review, test plan, and production readiness prompts for vibe-coded apps

### Formatting

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/formatting

#### JSON Prettifier
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-prettifier

Format and validate JSON data

#### XML Prettifier
URL: https://developers.do/tools/xml-prettifier

Format and validate XML data

#### HL7 Parser
URL: https://developers.do/tools/hl7-parser

Read and parse HL7 v2 messages into structured JSON

#### HL7 to FHIR Converter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/hl7-to-fhir

Convert HL7 v2 messages to FHIR R4 Bundles

#### Diff / Text Compare
URL: https://developers.do/tools/diff-compare

Compare two texts and see color-coded differences

#### Stacktrace Formatter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/stacktrace-formatter

Format and beautify stack traces from multiple programming languages

#### Beautify Stack Trace
URL: https://developers.do/tools/beautify-stack-trace

Clean up and beautify messy error stack traces for readability

#### Stack Trace Analyzer
URL: https://developers.do/tools/stacktrace-analyzer

Analyze stack traces to identify root causes, explain errors, and separate app from framework code

#### Base64 Encoder/Decoder
URL: https://developers.do/tools/base64-encoder

Encode and decode Base64 strings

#### File Size Converter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/file-size-converter

Convert file sizes between decimal (SI) and binary (IEC) units

#### Unix Timestamp Converter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/unix-timestamp

Convert between Unix epoch timestamps and human-readable dates with timezone support

#### Cron Expression Tester
URL: https://developers.do/tools/cron-tester

Test and parse cron expressions, explain them in plain English, and preview upcoming run times across timezones

#### Cron Expression Generator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/cron-generator

Build cron expressions visually with field controls — no syntax knowledge required

#### URL Encoder / Decoder
URL: https://developers.do/tools/url-encoder

Encode and decode URLs using encodeURIComponent and encodeURI

#### YAML ↔ JSON Converter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/yaml-json-converter

Convert between YAML and JSON with auto-detection of input format

#### CSV ↔ JSON Converter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/csv-json-converter

Convert between CSV and JSON with auto-detection, delimiter handling, type inference, and nested-object flattening

#### CSV Viewer / Table Explorer
URL: https://developers.do/tools/csv-viewer

Paste CSV and explore it as a sortable, searchable table with sticky headers — no spreadsheet required

#### SQL Formatter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/sql-formatter

Format and prettify SQL queries with support for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and more

### Algorithms

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/algorithms

#### String Similarity
URL: https://developers.do/tools/string-similarity

Compare strings using Jaro-Winkler, Levenshtein, Dice, and Hamming algorithms

#### Regex Tester
URL: https://developers.do/tools/regex-tester

Test regular expressions with match highlighting, capture groups, and string replacement

#### Regex Library
URL: https://developers.do/tools/regex-library

Browse and copy common regular expressions for validation, extraction, and text processing

#### Number Base Converter
URL: https://developers.do/tools/number-base-converter

Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hex with two's complement

### Apps

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/apps

#### iOS App Lookup
URL: https://developers.do/tools/ios-app-lookup

Look up iOS app metadata from the App Store using bundle ID

#### Terremoto
URL: https://terremoto.developers.do

iOS app for tracking earthquakes in real-time

#### FedPulse
URL: https://fedpulse.developers.do

iOS app to search, save, and track federal government jobs

#### FAA Part 107 Quiz Prep
URL: https://part107.developers.do

iOS app for FAA Part 107 drone pilot certification exam preparation

#### Citizenship Test Prep
URL: https://citizenshiptest.developers.do

iOS app for US citizenship naturalization test preparation

#### ClawPet
URL: https://clawpet.clawpantry.com

iOS virtual desktop pet that visualizes bot activity in real-time

### Generators

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/generators

#### Password Generator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/password-generator

Generate secure random passwords

#### UUID Generator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/uuid-generator

Generate UUIDs (v4)

#### Lorem Ipsum Generator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/lorem-ipsum-generator

Generate placeholder text for designs

#### Random Number Generator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/random-number-generator

Generate random numbers and see code samples in multiple languages

#### QR Code Generator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/qr-code-generator

Generate QR codes from text, URLs, or any data

### Code & Schemas

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/code-and-schemas

#### JSON to TypeScript
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-typescript

Convert JSON to TypeScript interfaces

#### JSON to JSDoc
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-jsdoc

Convert JSON to JSDoc type definitions

#### JSON to C#
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-csharp

Convert JSON to C# classes

#### JSON to Swift
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-swift

Convert JSON to Swift structs

#### JSON to Kotlin
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-kotlin

Convert JSON to Kotlin data classes

#### JSON to Python
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-python

Convert JSON to Python dataclasses or Pydantic models

#### JSON to Go
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-go

Convert JSON to Go structs

#### JSON to Rust
URL: https://developers.do/tools/json-to-rust

Convert JSON to Rust structs

#### Color Picker
URL: https://developers.do/tools/color-picker

Pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, and CMYK

### Security

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/security

#### Secrets Scanner
URL: https://developers.do/tools/secrets-scanner

Scan text, logs, or configs for leaked keys and tokens

#### JWT Decoder
URL: https://developers.do/tools/jwt-decoder

Decode and inspect JWT tokens

#### MD5 Hash
URL: https://developers.do/tools/md5-generator

Generate MD5 hashes from text

#### SHA-1 Hash
URL: https://developers.do/tools/sha1-generator

Generate SHA-1 hashes from text

#### SHA-256/512 Hash
URL: https://developers.do/tools/sha256-generator

Generate secure SHA-256 or SHA-512 hashes from text

#### Clawdbot Security Scanner
URL: https://developers.do/tools/clawdbot-security-scanner

Audit Clawdbot/Moltbot/OpenClaw configs for security vulnerabilities

#### Certificate & CSR Decoder
URL: https://developers.do/tools/csr-decoder

Decode X.509 certificates and PKCS#10 CSRs — subject, issuer, expiry, SANs, extensions, and key details

### SAML

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/saml

#### SAML Decoder
URL: https://developers.do/tools/saml-decoder

Decode SAML Requests/Responses from Base64 to readable XML

#### SAML Metadata Parser
URL: https://developers.do/tools/saml-metadata-parser

Parse SAML Metadata XML and extract IdP/SP configuration

#### SAML Certificate Inspector
URL: https://developers.do/tools/saml-cert-inspector

Inspect X.509 certificates from SAML metadata, responses, or PEM

#### SAML Assertion Builder
URL: https://developers.do/tools/saml-builder

Generate test SAML Responses, AuthnRequests, and LogoutRequests

#### SAML Metadata Generator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/saml-metadata-generator

Generate SAML 2.0 EntityDescriptor metadata XML for SPs and IdPs

#### SAML Response Validator
URL: https://developers.do/tools/saml-validator

Debug a SAML Response and find out why SSO login is failing

### Networking

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/networking

#### API Tester
URL: https://developers.do/tools/api-tester

Test and view API responses

#### HTTP Status Code Reference
URL: https://developers.do/tools/http-status-codes

Searchable reference of all HTTP status codes with descriptions and use cases

### Data

Category URL: https://developers.do/tools/data

#### OSS Data
URL: https://data.developers.do

Open-source data tools for developers
